              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-079cd602-5f96-44ea-8e71-33e5852b3201');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",

              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-f4dbd64e-0f26-4eac-85f4-827db3b6da0f');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "df['License'] = df['License'].fillna('Unknown')\n",
        "df['Topics'] = df['Topics'].fillna('Not Specified')\n",
        "df['Description'] = df['Description'].fillna('No Description Provided')\n",
        "\n",
        "df['Primary Language'] = df['Primary Language'].fillna('Other')\n",
        "\n",
        "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "date_cols = ['Created At', 'Updated At', 'Pushed At']\n",
        "for col in date_cols:\n",
        "    df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col])\n",
        "\n",
        "    df['Age_Years'] = (pd.Timestamp.now(tz='UTC') - df['Created At']).dt.days / 365\n",
        "\n",
        "    df['Topics'] = df['Topics'].astype(str).str.lower()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "    def categorize_stars(stars):\n",
        "        if stars < 5000:\n",
        "                return 'Emerging'\n",
        "        elif stars < 50000:\n",
        "                            return 'Established'\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "                                        return 'Legendary'\n",
        "\n",
        "                                        df['Repo_Tier'] = df['Stars Count'].apply(categorize_stars)"

              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-e0b832d9-93d0-4631-b78b-1043be046f11');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",

        "# Repository Age vs Open Issues Count\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert the 'Created At' column to datetime\n",
        "df['Created At'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Created At'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Calculate repository age in days\n",
        "df['Age (Days)'] = (pd.Timestamp.now(tz='UTC') - df['Created At']).dt.days\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Time Based Analysis : visualize the distribution of repositories over time\n",
        "\n",
        "Helps us understand trends in repository creation, activity, and maintenance"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "-oPwRREhWGU6"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Convert columns to datetime\n",
        "df['Created At'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Created At'])\n",
        "df['Pushed At'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Pushed At'])\n",
        "df['Updated At'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Updated At'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Extract years for comparison\n",
        "df['Year Created'] = df['Created At'].dt.year\n",
        "df['Year Pushed'] = df['Pushed At'].dt.year\n",
        "df['Year Updated'] = df['Updated At'].dt.year\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot distributions\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "sns.histplot(df['Year Created'], color='blue', label='Created At', kde=False, bins=15)\n",
        "sns.histplot(df['Year Pushed'], color='green', label='Pushed At', kde=False, bins=15)\n",
        "sns.histplot(df['Year Updated'], color='orange', label='Updated At', kde=False, bins=15)\n",
        "plt.title('Repositories Timeline: Created, Pushed, Updated')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Repositories')\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
